meaning: vt.开...锁,开启,显露,放开vi.开着,解开,解出锁定
examples: By turning yourself into a landscape detective, you can unlock some of its secrets.
Only one task may hold the mutex at a time, and only this task can unlock the mutex.
She planned to unlock the shop at 8:00 sharp this morning.
Collectively, these actions can help unlock our economy's potential and create opportunity for all Americans.
Characters can unlock an entirely new tier of skills, giving you more powers and customization options.
